mapper.select: SELECT * FROM RESUME WHERE createdUserId = #{createdUserId} ORDER BY createdDttm DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESUME ( userName, userPhone, portfolioUrl, userEmail, selfIntro, techSkills, academicHist, careerHist, appliedPosition, createdUserId, createdDttm, updatedDttm ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{portfolioUrl}, #{userEmail}, #{selfIntro}, #{techSkills}, #{academicHist}, #{careerHist}, #{appliedPosition}, #{createdUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE RESUME SET userName = #{userName}, userPhone = #{userPhone}, portfolioUrl = #{portfolioUrl}, userEmail = #{userEmail}, selfIntro = #{selfIntro}, techSkills = #{techSkills}, academicHist = #{academicHist}, careerHist = #{careerHist}, appliedPosition = #{appliedPosition}, updatedDttm = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
